issue.title: Promote transport get-first adapter to IR

artifacts.role: WordPress profile now emits WP_Http::_get_first_available_transport from structured IR
runner requiring both transport adapters to be emitted from IR
candidate manifest recording transport adapter template absence and IR feature evidence
public-shell snapshots covering the generated transport shell

claims: WP_Http::_get_first_available_transport is no longer emitted from a compiler-owned raw PHP adapter template.
Both WPHX-312.66 transport helper adapter bodies are emitted from structured WPHX PHP core IR.
The WPHX-312.66 oracle/candidate fixture still matches all six deterministic transport selection/dispatch cases after the get-first IR promotion.
non_claims: This does not claim full WP_Http transport dispatch ownership or whole-file WP_Http ownership.
This does not claim live cURL/streams/Requests network I/O, DNS/proxy/TLS behavior, or installed WordPress distribution behavior.
This does not claim WPHX PHP is a complete arbitrary-Haxe PHP backend.
